creator: freebsd@get-experience.com
text: Dash-to-dock requires a compilation step that was not performed when I installed the port. I had to create "/usr/local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/dash-to-dock@micxgx.gmail.com/schemas/gschemas.compiled" myself, by running "make" in "/usr/local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/dash-to-dock@micxgx.gmail.com".
